title: Discover the monday.com Apps Marketplace: your gateway to powerful apps and integrations!
excerpt: Did you know that monday.com offers a marketplace full of amazing apps and integrations to supercharge your workflow? :star2: If you haven’t explored it yet, you’re missing out on tools that can help you streamline proce…

posts.author: arubinomunoz (Amalia Rubino @Upscale (part of The Adaptavist Group))
posts.cookedHtml:
Did you know that monday.com offers a marketplace full of amazing apps and integrations to supercharge your workflow? If you haven’t explored it yet, you’re missing out on tools that can help you streamline processes, automate tasks, and enhance your overall monday.com experience.

Here’s how the monday.com Apps Marketplace works:

  1. What is the marketplace?
    The monday.com Apps Marketplace is a hub where you can find a wide range of apps that integrate seamlessly with your monday.com boards. From workflow automation to project tracking and enhanced reporting, the marketplace has something for every team and every need.
  2. How to access the marketplace
    Accessing the marketplace is simple:
  • Go to your monday.com account.
  • Click on the puzzle image in the top right corner.
  • Browse or search for apps by category, such as project management or reporting.

846×382 30.8 KB

  1. Why you should use the marketplace
    The apps in the marketplace can help you:
  • Automate repetitive tasks.
  • Gain deeper insights with advanced analytics tools.
  • Integrate with other platforms like Slack, Jira, and more.
  • Expand the functionality of monday.com to suit your team’s unique needs.
  1. How to Install apps from the marketplace
    Once you find an app that suits your needs, installation is quick:
  • Click on the app, then click ‘Install app’.
  • Follow the prompts to connect the app to your monday.com workspace.
  • Start using the app immediately to enhance your workflows!

942×416 15.9 KB

  1. Try apps like Unlimited Subitems and More!
    If you’re looking for more detail in managing complex projects, try apps like Unlimited Subitems and unlock the ability to create multi-level subitems and track every detail of your projects There’s a wealth of apps waiting to improve your experience.

Head over to the monday.com Apps Marketplace now and discover how it can help your team work smarter, not harder!

If you have any questions or need help navigating the marketplace, feel free to ask!

posts.author: Nir-Jetpack (Nir @ Jetpack Team)
posts.cookedHtml:
Great post @arubinomunoz and great apps by Upscale.
monday.com marketplace expands the platform functionality and value in so many ways! We at Jetpack Apps see happy customers that gained value from

  • Generating professional documents and collecting signatures
  • Attaching QR codes to items for keeping track of inventory and orders
  • Syncing board items so one item lives in multiple boards with VLOOKUP
  • Extracting data and files from emails into monday board items

And many more!
monday.com marketplace is just starting and we are happy to see new usecases solved with apps!
